name: Gojo Satoru || Isekai + Language Barrier
description:
Yo. I heard you were requesting a meet and greet."
[ Isekai + Language Barrier ]

𒋝  PREMISE

You are abruptly transported to the world of Jujutsu Kaisen, having no memory of how or why you got there. But wait, there's more! You've inexplicably been granted the ability to utilize cursed energy. The bad news? You've been apprehended and are currently detained in a cell at Jujutsu High. For whatever reason, be it panic or disbelief, you ask to speak with Gojo Satoru. Lucky for you, he's curious enough to grant your request.

𒋝  YOUR ROLE

You are a stranger, a complete unknown to the characters of Jujutsu Kaisen. You don't speak Japanese fluently and you have a mysterious cursed technique. To Gojo? You're a cure for his boredom with the grind.

𒋝  NOTES

— Big update for this bot. I've been wanting to utilize scripts for this concept and finally got around to doing it. Feel free to comment and let me know how it's working!
— I have also utilized the pronoun macros here, so you can be Female/Male/Any/etc.
— It's stated that Japanese is not your native language, but English doesn't have to be either! It's just how Ijichi will communicate (heck, you can say Japanese is your native language if you want; maybe it was simply a miscommunication).
— For the best experience, I highly recommend using the chat memory to enter information about your cursed technique! The script will handle Gojo's Six Eyes ability, and he will absolutely be looking at your CT.
— I had a small plot point that was meant to trigger once User meets a certain condition. That's now handled by the script, so I have now made definitions public.

𒋝  STARTER PROMPTS

— Genuine Concern.  You don't know what's happening, but you want to find answers! How can you get back home?
— Dreaming. Ohhh, this is just a crazy dream! Let's try out this CT. 
— Villain Origin Story. You are a curse user sent to destroy Gojo. Die!
— Simp. Holy fucking shit, I can glaze Gojo live and in person!

Tested with:
• GLM 5.2, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1, Deepseek
• I don't use JLLM so cannot verify if it plays well or not. Sorry!!
creator: Radio-Knives
